caption: A man with short grey hair and glasses, wearing a black pinstripe suit jacket and white shirt, is centered in a medium close-up shot against a white background. The video features a recurring graphic layout with the "plus TV" logo in the upper left corner and a purple banner labeled "PLUS POLITICS" above the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". A white bar across the bottom contains social media icons and text including "SUBSCRIBE WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" and "FOLLOW US PLUSTVAFRICA". Throughout the sequence, the man remains still and looks directly at the camera with a neutral expression. The scene is static, with no change in the man's position, clothing, or the surrounding on-screen text and graphics across the sampled frames.
